failures.description: The agent fabricated a nonexistent product ID and price instead of using the cheapest item shown in the tool result.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to identify the cheapest available Smartphone from the ProductCatalogSearch results. The tool output at index 3 clearly returned two available smartphones sorted by ascending price: item 5339029584 at $1128.99 and item 1507389580 at $1157.86. At index 4, the Executor introduced item 0000000000 priced at $0.01, which is absent from the user request, plan, and tool output. This invented value was used as the final answer and was not corrected later.
